title: 4 Pieces Plastic Stadium Horn Trumpets Toy Kids Soccer Games Horns Noise Maker for Football Soccer Games
features: Random Colors: Each set includes 4 stadium horns in random colors, adding a fun and colorful element to your festivities. The assortment of colors ensures that everyone can choose their favorite horn to use, creating a vibrant and dynamic atmosphere.

Durable Material: The stadium horns are made from durable, lightweight plastic material that is not only easy to blow but also resistant to cracking or breaking. The plastic is chosen for its vibrant color retention, ensuring that the horns maintain their bright and lively appearance even with frequent use.

Loud and Clear Sound: These stadium horns produce a loud and clear sound that adds excitement and energy to any event.Whether cheering for your favorite team or celebrating a special occasion, these horns are sure to be heard above the crowd.

Versatile Application: Perfect for sporting events, pep rallies, parades, concerts, and other gatherings, these stadium horns are versatile accessories that enhance any occasion. They are also great for parties, festivals, and celebrations, adding a festive touch to your festivities.

Proper Size: Each plastic stadium horn measures approximately 27.5x8.2cm, making them the perfect size for handheld use.The size design allows for easy transportation and storage, so you can bring them along to any event or activity.
